return b(w)end,function(y,a)local b=o(a)local f=function(...)return j(y,{...},a,b)end return f end,function(y,a)local b=o(a)local f=function()return j(y,{},a,b)end return f end return(d(1324872-627508,{}))(b(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[a(-327888+283720)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
